scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix DEL-api" "npm run dev --prefix DEL-web" "npm run dev --prefix DEL-cms"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix DEL-api && npm install --prefix DEL-web && npm install --prefix DEL-cms
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix DEL-web && npm run build --prefix DEL-cms
